name: Patient 16
history: Spent one year working on European project involving website and interviews. Pride in work but history of procrastination and anxiety. Uses strategies from course.
intermediate_belief: I always wait until the last minute and then panic.
intermediate_belief_depression: Despite my efforts, I'm fundamentally disorganized and unreliable.
coping_strategies: Using reminders, applying strategies from anxiety course.
situation: Working on project close to deadline with portions needing posting online.
auto_thought: I'm running out of time and won't finish properly.
behavior: Work frantically as deadline approaches with incomplete posting.
